text:
MC_PLAN_ELGBL_POP_ACTV_IND_10 

MC_PLAN_ELGBL_POP_ACTV_IND_11 

MC_PLAN_ELGBL_POP_ACTV_IND_12 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Eligible Population Active Indicator — January through December 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate the managed care entity authorized to enroll the Medicaid population specified in 
the MC_PLAN_ELGBLTY_GRP_POP_CD variable was active in the given month. Each of 12 months. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_ELGBL_POP_ACTV_IND_01 
MC_PLAN_ELGBL_POP_ACTV_IND_02 
MC_PLAN_ELGBL_POP_ACTV_IND_03
